title: TritonIconPack
description: An IconifyJSON icon pack for use with Triton diagrams. Place as *.triton-icons.json in .triton/icons/.

prefix.description: Pack identifier. Must start with a lowercase letter, followed by lowercase alphanumeric or hyphens. Examples: "azure", "mdi", "lucide".

icons.description: Icon entries keyed by bare name (no prefix). Each key matches [a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*. At least one entry required.

aliases.description: Optional alternate names for existing icons within this pack. Alias transforms compose on top of the parent icon.

width.description: Default viewport width in px for icons that do not specify their own. System default: 16.

height.description: Default viewport height in px. System default: 16.

left.description: Default viewport x-origin in px. System default: 0.

top.description: Default viewport y-origin in px. System default: 0.

IconData.description: Per-icon SVG body and optional dimension/transform overrides.

body.description: Inner SVG markup. No <svg> wrapper. Required and non-empty.

width.description: Icon-specific viewport width in px. Overrides pack-level width.

height.description: Icon-specific viewport height in px. Overrides pack-level height.

IconAlias.description: Alias pointing to a parent icon within the same pack. Transforms compose on top of the parent.

parent.description: Bare name of the parent icon within the same pack.

rotate.description: Additional rotation composed on top of parent's rotation (mod 4).

hFlip.description: Additional horizontal flip (XORed with parent's hFlip).

vFlip.description: Additional vertical flip (XORed with parent's vFlip).

width.description: Override viewport width for this alias.

height.description: Override viewport height for this alias.

left.description: Override viewport x-origin for this alias.

top.description: Override viewport y-origin for this alias.
